channel.title: BYOK on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in BYOK on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot for JetBrains expands BYOK capabilities
item.description:
GitHub Copilot for JetBrains now supports expanded bring-your-own-key (BYOK) customization across all Copilot tiers, with broader model provider flexibility and improved plugin/provider experiences. The update also includes changes to conversational interactions in the IDE.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot app support for BYOK
item.description:
GitHub Copilot app now supports bring your own key (BYOK), allowing agent sessions to use customer-managed model providers. Supported providers include OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Microsoft Foundry, Anthropic, and more.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot in Eclipse: BYOK, skills, and chat updates
item.description:
GitHub Copilot in Eclipse adds a refreshed chat experience, more session context visibility, BYOK for Business and Enterprise, improved ABAP support, and skills-related updates. The changelog notes multiple chat and workflow changes, but the provided excerpt does not include full technical details.

  • Source: GitHub
